ops.title: iOS board sticky section headers (LazyVStack pinnedViews restructure)
ops.description: Deferred half of UX-overhaul criterion 3 (board sticky sections + receipting) on iOS. Web landed both halves in e126413 (BoardBlocks.tsx: `position: sticky` section siblings + `data-decided` receipting). On iOS the receipting half shipped in this round (blockDecided derivation + receiptContent() content-only dimming). The sticky-pin half is deferred here because SwiftUI has no flat-sibling `position: sticky` primitive — pinning requires converting BoardScreen's eager `VStack` board content to `LazyVStack(pinnedViews: [.sectionHeaders])` with `Section(header:)` grouping, a restructure of the shared board layout. See the comment for the option-B design sketch.

ops.text: board content converts to one LazyVStack(pinnedViews:[.sectionHeaders]) with sectionGroups(_:) in BoardDerivations + Section(header:), no measurement/animation regressions on docHeader/history/focus-branch/pack webviews, sim-verified
